basic_details.short_information: Regional Ayurveda Research Institute (RARI) Yoga Therapist Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. F.No.3-4/2026/RARI/Itanagar/Proj/YOGA/24 on the official website of Regional Ayurveda Research Institute (RARI). A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RARI Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 for the post of Yoga Therapist.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with minimum 55% marks and two years experience, Graduate with one-year Diploma in Yoga (55% marks) and five years experience, Level II (Therapy level) Certificate of YCB
qualification.details: Yoga Therapist: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with minimum 55% marks from a recognized University and two years of experience in Yoga Therapy OR Any Graduate with a Diploma in Yoga (one year) with 55% marks and five years of practical experience; Level II (Therapy level) Certificate of YCB; Demonstration skills in Yogic practices.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Skill Test Written Test (if more than 10 candidates appear)

all_official_links.label: Download RARI Yoga Therapist Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for RARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the RARI Recruitment 2026 is Yoga Therapist. This is a contractual position offered by the Regional Ayurveda Research Institute.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Yoga Therapist post in the Regional Ayurveda Research Institute Recruitment 2026. This is a single opening for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates are required to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time without any prior online application.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Therapist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Yoga Therapist position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 38,000/- per month. This is the remuneration for the contractual role.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with 55% marks and two years of experience, or a Graduate with a one-year Diploma in Yoga (55% marks) and five years of experience, or a Level II (Therapy level) Certificate of YCB.

faq.question: Q6. What is the walk-in interview date for RARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the RARI Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 17th June 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Yoga Therapist role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview, a Skill Test, and potentially a Written Test if more than 10 candidates appear for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Regional Ayurveda Research Institute, Itanagar, Arunachal Pradesh, with the pincode 791111. The exact venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.
